headline: Citi’s Endorsement And Cash Focus Might Change The Case For Investing In PDD Holdings (PDD)
summary: In early July 2026, Citi named PDD Holdings one of its top picks among Chinese internet companies, pointing to what it sees as attractive valuations and resilient cash generation across the sector. Citi also underscored PDD’s sizeable cash and equivalents of about US$63.00 billion and growing AI capabilities as key supports for its long-term business strength. We’ll now explore how Citi’s endorsement and emphasis on PDD’s substantial cash reserves may influence the company’s existing...
